item.name: Shadow Wolf Horn
item.description: Steeped in shadow, this horn of bone emits a spine-chilling sound that brings your shadow wolf to your side.

mount.name: Shadow Wolf
mount.action: Summon forth your shadow wolf, a nightmare creature that could only be dreamed up by the darkest of souls.
mount.description: A spawn of darkest shadow, this dread wolf is said to have been created by an evil king to do battle with a hero of eld. Though the truth of the tale cannot be verified, the creature's eyes betray not a hint of hatred towards the Warrior of Light, whom it serves with unfaltering obedience.
mount.tooltip:
When brought into the light,
the wolf can seem less fearsome.
- Pumpkin-headed Apparition
